01-welcome.headline: Your photos belong in a book
01-welcome.subtext: Turn favorite moments into a beautifully arranged photo book, right on your Mac.

02-choose-photos.headline: Start wherever your photos live
02-choose-photos.subtext: Choose an album from Apple Photos or bring in a folder from your Mac.

03-refine-selection.headline: Keep the moments that tell the story
03-refine-selection.subtext: Review a balanced selection, bring favorites back in, and decide exactly what belongs in your book.

04-smart-layout.headline: A polished first draft in moments
04-smart-layout.subtext: PhotoBooks builds balanced pages automatically, so you can begin with a book—not a blank canvas.

05-photo-tools.headline: Make the moments that matter stand out
05-photo-tools.subtext: Emphasize, replace, add, or remove photos with focused controls that stay out of your way.

06-crop.headline: Perfect every crop
06-crop.subtext: Zoom and position a photo precisely, then lock the frame when it feels right.

07-photo-tray.headline: Keep every possibility close
07-photo-tray.subtext: See unplaced photos in the tray and bring them back into your book whenever inspiration strikes.

08-cover.headline: Create a cover worth keeping
08-cover.subtext: Give your story a memorable opening with a full wraparound cover and editable title.

09-format.headline: Choose the book that fits your story
09-format.subtext: Switch size and format while PhotoBooks carefully rebuilds the layout for you.

10-export.headline: From your Mac to the printed page
10-export.subtext: Preview finished pages, then export print-ready files for Blurb or a universal PDF.
